purpose: Restore or precisely characterize Windows reference host reachability for validation and soak runs.
constraints: Use explicit SSH identity ~/.ssh/ecdsa_home with BatchMode and ConnectTimeout.
Do not disrupt PR #641 or PR #642 review workers.
Do not run Beads lifecycle mutations.

open_pr_context.title: feat: add portal diagnostic input injector [hud-t95gs]
perf: split widget text raster caches [hud-9wljr.2]

probes.name: tailscale_status_target
probes.command: timeout 8s tailscale status --json | jq -r '.Peer[] | select((.HostName|ascii_downcase|contains("tzehouse")) or (.DNSName|ascii_downcase|contains("tzehouse")) or ((.TailscaleIPs // [])[]? == "100.87.181.125")) | {HostName,DNSName,TailscaleIPs,OS,Online,Active,Relay,CurAddr,LastSeen,LastWrite,LastHandshake,InNetworkMap,InMagicSock,InEngine,KeyExpiry}'

probes.name: tailscale_ping
probes.stdout:
ping "100.87.181.125" timed out
ping "100.87.181.125" timed out

probes.name: icmp_ping
probes.stdout:
PING tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net (100.87.181.125) 56(84) bytes of data.

--- tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net ping statistics ---
3 packets transmitted, 0 received, 100% packet loss, time 2054ms

probes.name: tcp_connectivity
probes.command: for port in 22 50051 9090; do timeout 8s nc -vz -w 5 tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net "$port"; done
probes.stderr:
nc: connect to tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net (100.87.181.125) port 22 (tcp) timed out: Operation now in progress
nc: connect to tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net (100.87.181.125) port 50051 (tcp) timed out: Operation now in progress
nc: connect to tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net (100.87.181.125) port 9090 (tcp) timed out: Operation now in progress

probes.name: ssh_hudbot_whoami
probes.command: timeout 15s ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o ServerAliveInterval=3 -o ServerAliveCountMax=1 -o BatchMode=yes -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/ecdsa_home hudbot@tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net "whoami"
probes.stderr: ssh: connect to host tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net port 22: Connection timed out

probes.name: ssh_tzeus_whoami
probes.command: timeout 15s ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o ServerAliveInterval=3 -o ServerAliveCountMax=1 -o BatchMode=yes -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/ecdsa_home tzeus@tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net "whoami"
probes.stderr: ssh: connect to host tzehouse-windows.parrot-hen.ts.net port 22: Connection timed out

probes.name: adjacent_synology_auth_hudbot
probes.command: timeout 15s ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o ServerAliveInterval=3 -o ServerAliveCountMax=1 -o BatchMode=yes -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/ecdsa_home hudbot@tzehouse-synology.parrot-hen.ts.net "uname -a"

probes.name: adjacent_synology_auth_tzeus
probes.command: timeout 15s ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o ServerAliveInterval=3 -o ServerAliveCountMax=1 -o BatchMode=yes -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/ecdsa_home tzeus@tzehouse-synology.parrot-hen.ts.net "uname -a"

verdict.reason: The Windows tailnet node is present but offline in Tailscale status; all direct Windows SSH/HUD service probes time out. Adjacent Synology SSH is reachable, but this worker lacks key access and no documented out-of-band Windows recovery command exists in the repository.

blocked_by.required_event: TzeHouse Windows node comes online in Tailscale and accepts non-interactive SSH for both hudbot and tzeus; HUD ports 50051 and 9090 become reachable.
